subcodes.first_line: Another letter from his honor Mullá Báqir, upon him be Bahá'í glory, attained unto Our presence and was granted the honor of being heard. The schemes and [3.5s]

subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @firmness in the Covenant, @justice and wrath of God, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @consolation and comfort
